steps.title: Find the slope of line k
steps.content:
The line passes through (0,-8) and (3,4). Use slope formula $$m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1}$$.
Plug in: $$m = \frac{4 - (-8)}{3 - 0} = \frac{12}{3} = 4$$.

steps.title: Write the equation using slope-intercept form
steps.content: The y-intercept is given as (0,-8), so b = -8. With slope m = 4, the line is $$y = 4x - 8$$.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 18 to find w
